title: 05 — Distribution & Infrastructure
summary: Specifies DebateOS's zero-cost distribution model: GitHub-backed registry, user-CI and Docker build paths, the optional Forum service, and the private-pane secrets invariants.
scope: registry (GitHub-backed YAML + GitHub Pages static index)
distributed CI build path (GitHub Actions on user credits)
The Forum (Go/chi service, SQLite via sqlc store interface, FTS5)
Forum hosting (Oracle Cloud Always Free Ampere A1, owner-hosted fallback)
secrets model (no secrets in shared artifacts, first-boot injection)
optional future hosted builds (out of scope v1.0)
notes: Manifest declared SPEC; content corroborates (architecture/infrastructure contracts, mandatory security properties, storage interfaces). References doc `06` (collaborative conflict-resolution workflow) inline without a full path. Contains invariant-style language ('Core constraint (invariant)', 'all mandatory') with mild ADR flavor, but manifest type is authoritative.
